topic.what: Interactive phishing URL triage system using decoupled operator and adjudicator agents that navigate interaction gates and verify MITRE ATT&CK checklist
topic.how: Sandboxed GUI browser driven by persona-based operator captures multi-modal evidence; stateless adjudicator queries evidence on-demand against MITRE ATT&CK tactics to produce verdicts
topic.why_matters: Modern phishing evades static classifiers via CAPTCHA gates, delayed rendering, and logo-less harvesters; existing approaches fail on 61% of APWG URLs that return errors to crawlers

characteristics.what_it_measures: Proportion of positive predictions that are correct
characteristics.vs_baseline: Matches PhishIntention and Phishpedia (100%) but outperforms them on real-world triage where they degrade to 33-45%
characteristics.evidence: 708 URL evaluation (241 PhishTank phishing + 467 Tranco benign)
characteristics.context: On accessible subset of 53 real-world URLs; maintains 93.75% on full set including cloaked URLs

characteristics.what_it_measures: Proportion of actual phishing URLs correctly identified
characteristics.vs_baseline: 4x improvement over PhishIntention (14.7%), 7.7x over Phishpedia (8.8%), 5.8x over PhishVLM (11.8%)
characteristics.evidence: 708 URL evaluation; 14-day pilot with 71 reachable URLs (46 phishing, 25 benign)
characteristics.context: Critical improvement on logo-less phishing (56% vs 0-12%) and non-CRP objectives (100% vs 8.3%)

characteristics.what_it_measures: Ability to access URLs blocked by standard crawlers
characteristics.vs_baseline: Baselines (Selenium) blocked by 25% of live URLs returning 403/500; TraceScope accesses all 71 valid URLs
characteristics.evidence: 14-day pilot deployment with IT security analysts
characteristics.context: 18 of 71 live URLs were inaccessible to baseline crawlers but fully functional for TraceScope

characteristics.vs_baseline: 5.5x cheaper than human analyst ($1.33 for 2-min manual review)
characteristics.context: Adaptive bimodal: $0.04 median for standard sites, $1.53 p99 for adversarial targets; TracePilot adds constant ~$0.20

characteristics.what_itasures: Completeness and immutability of captured session artifacts
characteristics.evidence: Multi-layer capture: ffmpeg video, synchronized HAR logs, PyAutoCapture cognitive trace with visual overlays
characteristics.context: Enables downstream adjudicator to reference specific timestamps and resource IDs; eliminates observer effect

characteristics.what_itasures: Suitability for IR team consumption and compliance
characteristics.evidence: Bottom-line-up-front structure with executive summary, security to-do list, MITRE ATT&CK mapping in appendices
characteristics.context: Report writer generates structured verdicts with IOC extraction; constrained by MCP tools to prevent hallucination

good_for: triage of cloaked URLs that block crawlers
not_for: infinite CAPTCHA loops with adversarial blocking
requires: upstream signals (user reports or static classifier verdicts)

novelty: Decoupled operator-adjudicator architecture with visual air-gap
Deterministic temporal normalization aligning video frames with network packets
Checklist-driven MITRE ATT&CK adjudication via stateless auditor
Synthetic persona injection for credential-harvesting form handling
Immutable evidence bundle generation preventing observer effect
open_problems: VLM symbol hallucination causing incorrect CAPTCHA solutions
Literal transcription errors (typing digits instead of computing sums)
SwiftShader WebGL renderer signature leaking sandbox detection
Infinite challenge loops where server presents new gates after correct solution
Transition to QEMU/KVM with hardware passthrough to eliminate virtualization artifacts
